sales.description:
NICEPHORUS II PHOCAS with BASIL II, 963-969. AV Histamenon Nomisma (4.40 gms), Constantinople Mint, 967-969. NGC Ch EF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5. Edge Marks.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1778. Obverse: Facing bust of Christ Pantokrator; Reverse: Facing busts of the Theotokos and Nicephorus, holding between them a patriarchal cross. Quite charming, with impressive strike quality and gleaming bright luster, with the noted edge marks being minor and unobt...
